category_sources: source_facts.description says it converts Marp Markdown files into HTML/CSS, PDF, PPT, and images; official repo describes a CLI interface for Marp converters.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository is marp-team/marp-cli; Marp site identifies Marp as the Markdown Presentation Ecosystem.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the marp-cli documentation surface; official Marp site documents the broader Marp ecosystem and links to official tools.
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository and source_facts.repo was empty, so the official repo is https://github.com/marp-team/marp-cli.
tags_sources: source_facts.description lists Markdown-to-HTML/CSS/PDF/PPT/image conversion; official repo identifies marp-cli as a CLI converter interface.
